SEARCH
Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.device

Class SmartLight

java.lang.Object
edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartLight
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEdgeDevice
public class SmartLight extends Object implements IEdgeDevice
Represents a smart light edge device.

Supports two actions: DeviceAction.LIGHT_ON and DeviceAction.LIGHT_OFF. Maintains a simple boolean state tracking whether the light is currently on or off.

  • Constructor Details

    • SmartLight

      public SmartLight(String deviceId, String name)
      Constructs a SmartLight.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the unique ID for this light
      name - the human-readable name for this light

  • Method Details

    • getDeviceId

      public String getDeviceId()
      Returns the globally unique identifier of this device.
      Specified by:
      getDeviceId in interface IEdgeDevice
      Returns:
      device ID string

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the human-readable name of this device.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface IEdgeDevice
      Returns:
      device name (e.g., "Kitchen Speaker")

    • getAvailableActions

      public List<DeviceAction> getAvailableActions()
      Returns the list of actions this device is capable of performing. Sent to the coordinator during registration.
      Specified by:
      getAvailableActions in interface IEdgeDevice
      Returns:
      list containing DeviceAction.LIGHT_ON and DeviceAction.LIGHT_OFF

    • start

      public void start(IMessageBus messageBus)
      Starts the device: registers with the message bus, publishes a RegistrationPayload to the REGISTER topic, subscribes to the COMMAND topic to receive commands, and begins emitting heartbeats on the HEARTBEAT topic.

      Publishes a RegistrationPayload for this light to the REGISTER topic with DeviceType.LIGHT and subscribes to COMMAND and HEARTBEAT topics.

      Specified by:
      start in interface IEdgeDevice
      Parameters:
      messageBus - the shared message bus to register and communicate through

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Gracefully shuts down the device, unsubscribing from the message bus and stopping heartbeat emission.
      Specified by:
      stop in interface IEdgeDevice

    • executeCommand

      public CommandStatus executeCommand(Command command)
      Executes an incoming command received from the COMMAND topic. Validates that the action is in IEdgeDevice.getAvailableActions(), performs the internal state change, and returns the outcome.

      Switches the internal on state based on the action. Returns CommandStatus.INVALID_ACTION for any action that is not LIGHT_ON or LIGHT_OFF.

      Specified by:
      executeCommand in interface IEdgeDevice
      Parameters:
      command - the command to execute
      Returns:
      CommandStatus.SUCCESS if executed successfully, CommandStatus.INVALID_ACTION if the action is not supported, or CommandStatus.FAILURE if execution failed

    • sendHeartbeat

      public void sendHeartbeat()
      Emits a heartbeat message to the HEARTBEAT topic on the message bus. Called periodically by an internal timer so the coordinator knows the device is still online.
      Specified by:
      sendHeartbeat in interface IEdgeDevice

    • isOn

      public boolean isOn()
      Returns the current on/off state of this light.
      Returns:
      true if the light is on, false if off
